title: Randomize Statement
syntax:
(1) Randomize
			seedValue

(2) Randomize

seedValue	Specify a real value (0 or more) to be basis to retrieve a random number.
description:
Randomize Statement

Randomize Statement

See_Also Example

Initializes the random-number generator.
see_also:
Rnd Function

Randomize Statement Example

Function main

		  Integer randNum

Randomize

randNum = Int(Rnd(10)) + 1

		  Print "Random number is:", randNum

		Fend
examples:
Function main
		  Integer randNum

			  Randomize

randNum = Int(Rnd(10)) + 1
		  Print "Random number is:", randNum
		Fend
